locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

locations.name: 灌木林
locations.summary: 灌木林与矮树林是一类特殊生物群系，其密度较灌丛高，高度较疏林矮。由于产生条件苛刻，灌木林只成片分布于两类地区。木干较灌木粗壮的可称为矮树林。 高山常绿阔叶云林 这种常绿阔叶亚型主要分布于菲律宾、苏门答腊等岛屿及中南美洲的安第斯山，常常位于…

relations.subject: Eye-ringed thistletail
relations.evidence: It inhabits the narrow ecotone of the upper edges of cloudforest and the elfin forest above it

relations.subject: Eye-ringed thistletail
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "Land-use practises such as burning, grazing, and the conversion/clearance of paramo grasslands and forest patches for small-scale agriculture has greatly reduced the total surface extent of the linear Andean tree-line ecotone [and the] effects of habitat loss on the tree-line bird community have not yet been studied quantitatively."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
